title: Ubiquiti POE-24-12W-WH
category: Ubiquiti / Powering / Pasive PoE / PoE injectors
description: The Ubiquiti POE-24-12W-WH is a grounded PoE injector with a maximum output power of 12 W. It provides one input port for a traditional LAN connection and a second port as a PoE output port. The maximum data transfer rate is 100 Mbps. This device is not equipped with LED indicator Maximum Output Power 12 W One PoE Port Maximum Transfer Rate 100 Mbps No LED Indicator GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
